description: A landscape photograph depicting a large, dark, rounded, cone-shaped mountain or hill under a partly cloudy sky. The foreground and middle ground feature a rocky, sparsely vegetated terrain, with low-lying plants in shades of brown and reddish-brown. A small patch of white snow is visible in the middle ground, along with several scattered light-coloured rocks. The image is associated with the caption "Bare rocks and rock debris (Sweden)" and is credited to K. Larsson.
